response.justification: Strong 19+ years of engineering experience with proven staff-level leadership, full-stack builder skills across multiple domains, and current work in AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks at re:cinq). However, lacks demonstrated deep AI/ML product expertise and director-level strategic scope the role requires. The preferred advanced degree in AI is also missing. Could develop into the principal role if current AI infrastructure work validates broader platform expertise and leadership scope.
strengths: 19+ years of progressive engineering experience exceeding minimum requirement, with multiple staff-level and senior leadership positions demonstrating sustained technical authority
Currently building AI infrastructure and agent frameworks (MCP) at re:cinq, showing active and relevant engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies and platforms
Full-stack builder with deep technical capability across web, mobile, embedded, cloud (AWS, Kubernetes), and multiple languages, combined with entrepreneurial mindset (GISCollective founder)
concerns: AI expertise is recent and infrastructure-focused (MCP frameworks, developer tooling) rather than having demonstrated products or platforms built with AI as stated preference
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related field, which is explicitly preferred for this director-level AI strategy role
Current and prior roles lack evidence of director-level strategic scope, major platform initiatives, or recognized AI industry expertise required for principal-level influence

key_factors.factor: Experience Level and Leadership Track Record
Current Alignment with AI Infrastructure Focus
